name: popover
title: Popover
description: Floating panel anchored to a trigger for compact secondary content.
docs:
# Popover
Floating panel anchored to a trigger for compact secondary content.
## Import
```tsx
import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverAnchor, PopoverContent } from "@/components/ui/popover";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Popover title="Dimensions" description="Set the width and height for the layer." side={undefined} title="Dimensions" />
```
## Props
- **title** (string) — default: `"Dimensions"`: Title
- **description** (string) — default: `"Set the width and height for the layer."`: Description
- **side** (string): Side
- **title** (string) — default: `"Dimensions"`: Title
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add popover
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/popover
```
